title: Discount type chip
description: Colour-coded chip for coupons.discount_type. Shows the type + a compact rendering of the amount when applicable. Never colour-alone — carries text label + icon. Advanced discount types (free_period / first_month_free / bogo) render in accent variant when tenant has the entitlement, muted otherwise (renders as a preview of what an upgrade would unlock).

discountAmount.description: Amount interpretation depends on discountType. Optional.

showAmount.description: When false, renders only the type name without the amount.

leadingIcon.$expr: ({ percent: 'percent-badge', fixed_amount: 'currency-dollar', free_period: 'calendar', first_month_free: 'gift', bogo: 'squares-plus', free_shipping: 'truck' })[props.discountType]

children.$expr: props.showAmount === false ? ({ percent: 'Percent', fixed_amount: 'Fixed', free_period: 'Free period', first_month_free: 'First month free', bogo: 'BOGO', free_shipping: 'Free shipping' })[props.discountType] : (props.discountType === 'percent' && props.discountAmount != null ? Math.round(props.discountAmount * 100) + '% off' : (props.discountType === 'fixed_amount' && props.discountAmount != null ? formatMoney(props.discountAmount, props.discountCurrency || 'USD') + ' off' : (props.discountType === 'free_period' && props.discountAmount != null ? props.discountAmount + ' days free' : ({ first_month_free: 'First month free', bogo: 'Buy 1, get 1', free_shipping: 'Free shipping' })[props.discountType])))
